color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;
color: rgb(63, 36, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
L1 - HBM (GPU)
medium: resident in HBM
make-resident cost: 0
holds: runnable / decoding agents

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
L2 - system DRAM
medium: HBM<->DRAM DMA over PCIe/NVLink
make-resident cost: a few ms
holds: idle-but-warm (blocked on a tool call)

div.style: color: rgb(58, 42, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
L3 - local NVMe/SSD
medium: ~GB/s, content-addressed
make-resident cost: tens of ms
holds: cold agents (idle a long time)

div.style: color: rgb(27, 58, 102) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
L4 - recompute from tokens
medium: re-prefill from token log
make-resident cost: proportional to context length
holds: the backstop - drop the KV, re-prefill

div.style: color: rgb(107, 84, 16) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
L3 vs L4 crossover (decidable)
transfer ~ S / BW_interconnect (bw-bound)
vs recompute ~ T * prefill_flops / FLOPS (compute-bound)
long ctx -> keep bytes; short / contended bus -> recompute

div.style: color: rgb(28, 82, 48) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(110, 31, 27) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(70, 88, 106) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Density per 80GB H100 (after weights):
8B@50K: ~10 warm/H100; 3B: ~42; +headroom: ~100-150
measure, don't assert
